hero.subtitle2: From airport to finish line — we handle everything.

features.subtitle: Join Africa's first candidate for the Abbott World Marathon Majors series. Train with elite coaches, explore Cape Town, and become part of history.
features.feature1Desc: Train with certified marathon coaches on Table Mountain routes
features.feature3Desc: From airport pickup to finish line celebration

newsletter.successMessage: You're in! Check your email for confirmation.
newsletter.privacy: No spam, unsubscribe anytime. We respect your privacy.

prepCamp.title: Train Smarter in
prepCamp.description: A world-class prep camp designed for marathon runners. Train with elite coaches, recover in luxury, and arrive at the start line in peak condition.

nutrition.title: Nutrition Plans
nutrition.desc: Personalized meal prep for peak performance

route.title: 42.2 Kilometers of
route.description: From the Atlantic seaboard to the shadow of Table Mountain — one of the world's most scenic marathon routes.

metadata.title: About the Race — Cape Town Marathon 2027
metadata.description: Africa's first Abbott World Marathon Major. History, course, records, and what makes Cape Town 2027 legendary.

hero.title: Africa's First
hero.subtitle: From candidacy to history. The Sanlam Cape Town Marathon joins the world's most prestigious marathon series in 2027.

1994.title: The Beginning
1994.desc: First edition with 500 runners. Julian Paul wins in 2:26:45.

2014.title: Rapid Growth
2014.desc: Race expands to 10,000+ participants. Becomes South Africa's premier road race.

2024.title: AbbottWMM Candidate
2024.desc: Officially enters candidacy period for Abbott World Marathon Majors.

2026.title: Final Assessment
2026.desc: Record-breaking edition. Mohamed Esa runs 2:04:55 — fastest marathon on African soil.

2027.title: Africa's First Major
2027.desc: Officially joins Tokyo, Boston, London, Berlin, Chicago, New York, and Sydney as the 8th AbbottWMM.

wmm.title: Joining the World's
wmm.subtitle: The Abbott World Marathon Majors is a series of the world's largest and most renowned marathons. Cape Town becomes the 8th member and the first from Africa.

course.title: 42.2 Kilometers of
course.subtitle: Start and finish at Green Point Stadium. A scenic coastal route with Table Mountain as your constant companion.
course.note: The final 5km features the famous 'Loop of Death' — passing the finish line before one final push to glory.

records.title: Records Made to
records.menDesc: Fastest marathon ever run on African soil on a certified course
records.womenDesc: South African national record set on home soil
records.legendDesc: Two-time Olympic champion's first marathon on African soil

cta.title: Be Part of
cta.subtitle: Join 20,000+ runners at Africa's first Abbott World Marathon Major. Entries open 10–24 June 2026.
